caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, positioned in front of a large television screen and a shelf of media cases. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Above them, a neon sign displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". A smaller video window is overlaid on the center of the scene, showing clips from a historical battle. In the first frame, the overlay shows distant soldiers on a dusty plain. In the second frame, the overlay shifts to a close-up of a soldier in a helmet. By the final frame, the overlay displays a wide shot of a massive army gathered in a valley. Throughout the sequence, the two men maintain focused, somber expressions, with the man on the right resting his chin on his hand as they watch the footage.
